svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="审查-修复收敛循环" id="puaConverge3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-463" dy="-121" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="退出条件从「修了几个」变成「连续 N 轮全绿」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="480" x="220" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 1 轮
15 RED + 28 YELLOW
11 agent 并行扫" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="PUA 卡住：
修完必须贴证据
冰山思维扫同类" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="250" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 2 轮
降到 3 RED
（修 R1 牵出的同类）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="420" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="还有问题
不许收敛" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="630" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ELG" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="G1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EGL2" edge="1" parent="1" source="G1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="L2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EL2N1" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="N1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="第 3 轮
还剩 1 YELLOW
（IFNULL 边界值没测）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="40" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="PUA 卡住：
RCA 诊断行 + 5 步穷尽
补边界值用例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="250" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="第 4 轮
全绿 ✅
连续 N 轮零问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="420" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EXIT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="允许收敛退出
kd-review 挖 + PUA 卡" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="630" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EN1L3" edge="1" parent="1" source="N1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EL3G3" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="G3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EG3L4" edge="1" parent="1" source="G3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="L4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EL4EXIT" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="EXIT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BARE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="对比 · 裸跑 kd-review：第 1 轮 15 RED，修 5 个最显眼的，贴一句「其余建议人工跟进」就收手" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="760" x="80" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="审查的难点不在「找不找得到」，在「找完了愿不愿意继续找」——PUA 把这个意愿卡死" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="680" x="120" y="372" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
